description_long: This object is a pair of over-ear headphones with a distinctive steampunk-inspired design, featuring a metallic frame and visible mechanical components. The headband is arched and reinforced with rivets, while the ear cups are padded with a quilted, deep red cushion for comfort. The exterior of the ear cups is encased in a brass-like metal, adorned with bolts and intricate tubing, giving it an industrial aesthetic. A black cable extends from one ear cup, suggesting a wired connection for audio input. The ear cups are large and circular, with a mesh or grille pattern on the outer side, possibly for acoustic or decorative purposes. The overall construction appears robust, blending both functional and decorative elements typical of retro-futuristic electronics.
description: A steampunk-style pair of over-ear headphones with brass metalwork, red quilted ear pads, and a black audio cable.
description_view_0: Front view showing both large, circular ear cups with red padding and the arched, riveted headband.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the metallic ear cup exterior, visible tubing, and the mesh grille on the outer side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the headband and the symmetrical design of the ear cups.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the metallic and mechanical details.
